decisions.decision: Use toHaveStyle() from jest-dom for all inline style assertions (beacon colors, CountCard colors, boxShadow glow), matching established codebase patterns in AccountPnlSection.test.tsx and AnalyticsFilters.test.tsx
alternatives_rejected: Direct element.style property access — less idiomatic, not the project convention
getComputedStyle — overkill for inline styles, less readable

decisions.decision: Use mockReturnValue(new Promise(() => {})) (never-resolving promise) on API client mocks to simulate loading state, matching Analytics.test.tsx:71 pattern
alternatives_rejected: Mocking react-query hook state directly — breaks existing mock-at-client-level pattern
Using msw/fake timers — unnecessary complexity when never-resolving promise works

decisions.decision: Test both Error branches: mockRejectedValue(new Error('msg')) for error.message display AND a non-Error rejection for 'Connection failed' fallback, covering both branches of the instanceof check at System.tsx:56
alternatives_rejected: Only testing one branch — leaves the other untested, defeating coverage goal
Using BayesApiError — extends Error so tests same branch as standard Error

decisions.decision: Verify actual formatted string output from formatCurrency (e.g., assert '2.0K' appears for volume=2000) to test the integration of data computation → formatting → rendering
alternatives_rejected: Simple presence check — misses computation bugs in the sum/reduce logic
Mocking formatCurrency — defeats integration testing purpose

decisions.decision: Keep all new tests in the existing System.test.tsx file, mocking at @/lib/api/client level using the existing vi.hoisted + vi.mock pattern
alternatives_rejected: Separate test files per concern — unnecessary fragmentation for one component
Mocking hooks directly — inconsistent with existing test architecture

steps.task: Add health loading state test: mock getHealth with never-resolving promise, assert 'Checking...' text and orange beacon via toHaveStyle({ background: 'var(--color-warning, orange)' })

Add health error state test (Error instance): mock getHealth with mockRejectedValue(new Error('Network error')), assert error.message text appears and red beacon via toHaveStyle({ background: 'var(--color-danger)' })
Add health error state test (non-Error fallback): mock getHealth with mockRejectedValue('string error'), assert 'Connection failed' fallback text appears
Add healthy beacon style test: verify green beacon has toHaveStyle({ background: 'var(--color-success)' }) and glow toHaveStyle({ boxShadow: '0 0 8px var(--color-success)' }) when health returns ok
Add markets loading state test: mock listMarkets with never-resolving promise, assert loading indicator appears in the Markets section (LoadingPage component)
Add platform stats formatCurrency integration test: provide mock markets with known volumes/liquidity (e.g., 500+1500=2000), assert formatted output '2.0K' renders for Total Volume
Add CountCard color assertion test: verify that status count cards apply correct colors via toHaveStyle({ color: 'var(--color-success)' }) for active markets count
Add empty markets array test: provide empty markets array, assert all status counts render as 0 and totals render as '$0'
Add API info section test: verify apiVersion from index.data.meta renders, and multiple route groups are displayed correctly
Run full test suite (vitest run System) to verify all new tests pass alongside existing tests, fix any failures
